full_text:
Zhang Wei 張衛
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhang Wei (張衛). Zhang Lu’s younger brother. Beheaded after a brilliant battle with Xu Chu. Zhang Wei was affiliated with Zhang Lu.
Return to theThree Kingdoms Encyclopediaor browse theEncyclopedia Directory.
